nodes.label: AI as drafting assistant for emails
nodes.grounding_span: AIs can usually incorporate a good business like tone and shoot out an email really quickly

nodes.label: AI as refinement tool for maintaining personal touch
nodes.grounding_span: I'll change the intro or touch up a sentence

nodes.label: AI for mundane tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Mostly doing emails, writeups, payroll, and mundane stuff

nodes.label: Human pride in dispatching and courier work
nodes.grounding_span: we have a sort of human pride for dispatching and most of the hearty 'couriery' stuff

nodes.label: AI as homogenizer of culture and ideas
nodes.grounding_span: we are very 'worker first' and would heavily resist replacing a big role with AI

nodes.label: AI as tool for market and business perspective
nodes.grounding_span: it could be used for client acquisition, analyzing where we could expand our role

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: getting a few emails hammered out is really helpful

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal integrity
nodes.grounding_span: I want the personal voice to come through a touch

nodes.label: Autonomy and personal control
nodes.grounding_span: we are very grass roots and independent

nodes.label: Business growth and profitability
nodes.grounding_span: make us a formidable contender in the wasteland of couriers

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for email drafting
nodes.grounding_span: there's times where the AI writeups are super helpful even unedited

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in core courier tasks
nodes.grounding_span: we like to keep it human

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I'd like to look into how we could use AI to automate payroll

nodes.label: Pragmatic delegation with fallback confidence
nodes.grounding_span: I'd rather get a generally solid writeup and then touch it up myself

nodes.label: Contextual boundary setting based on organizational knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: For writing a very important email to a big client... I won't use an AI
